Title: Creates a publicly accessible database for contracts made between U.S. immigration and customs enforcement and private entities conducting business in the state of New York
Summary: Creates a publicly accessible database for contracts made between U.S. immigration and customs enforcement and private entities conducting business in the state of New York; requires entities to provide the department of state with a copy of contracts made between U.S. immigration and customs enforcement and private entities operating in the state of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to creating a publicly accessible database for contracts entered into by U.S. immigration and customs enforcement and private entities
